mapper.sql: SELECT peer_bank_id, org_code, org_name, org_address, longitude, latitude, bank_name, province, city, district, town, grid_code, del_flag, create_time, update_time FROM jw_peer_bank_info
mapper.select: WHERE city = #{city} AND (del_flag IS NULL OR del_flag = '0') AND bank_name NOT IN ('其他银行', '工商银行') ORDER BY peer_bank_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jw_peer_bank_info ( org_code, org_name, org_address, longitude, latitude, bank_name, province, city, district, town, grid_code, del_flag, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{orgCode}, #{orgName}, #{orgAddress}, #{longitude}, #{latitude}, #{bankName}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{town}, #{gridCode}, #{delFlag}, now(), now() )

INSERT INTO jw_peer_bank_info ( org_code, org_name, org_address, longitude, latitude, bank_name, province, city, district, town, grid_code, del_flag, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
(#{item.orgCode}, #{item.orgName}, #{item.orgAddress}, #{item.longitude}, #{item.latitude}, #{item.bankName}, #{item.province}, #{item.city}, #{item.district}, #{item.town}, #{item.gridCode}, #{item.delFlag}, now(), now())
